Description

CONTAC T PERS ON
Gregory W. Martin, PhD (Greg)
M&A Advisor, ProNova Partners
Email: gregmartin@pronovapartners.com
Phone: (317) 760-1512
Greg Martin has been a mergers and acquisition advisor since 2019, joining ProNova Partners in 2023. Greg has an international reputation as an
accounting and finance expert with over a dozen premier academic publications and is a tenured accounting professor at the University of North
Carolina at Charlotte.
Prior to his academic and M&A career, Greg served in the active-duty Air Force as an acquisitions officer. Greg holds degrees from the United
States Air Force Academy (Bachelor of Science), the University of Notre Dame (MBA), and the University of Colorado (PhD in Accounting).
